enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Balle Vellaiya Thevaa?

The song conveys a sense of celebration and joy, encouraging listeners to embrace the festive spirit.

What is the plot context of the movie Balle Vellaiya Thevaa?

The movie revolves around themes of fun and festivities, making the song a perfect fit for its narrative.

Who is the singer of Balle Vellaiya Thevaa?

The song is sung by Sathya Prakash, known for his energetic performances.

Who composed the music for the song?

The music for Balle Vellaiya Thevaa was composed by Darbuka Siva, who is known for his unique style.

When was Balle Vellaiya Thevaa released?

The song was released on December 8, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Balle Vellaiya Thevaa is a lively and energetic number that encapsulates the essence of celebration and joy. It plays a significant role in the movie, enhancing the festive atmosphere and encouraging the audience to join in the fun. With its catchy beats and engaging lyrics, the song evokes feelings of happiness and excitement. The vibrant composition by Darbuka Siva paired with Sathya Prakash's dynamic vocals makes it a perfect anthem for parties and celebrations.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Balle Vellaiya Thevaa is a vibrant and energetic track that perfectly captures the festive spirit of celebration. With Sathya Prakash's captivating vocals and Darbuka Siva's dynamic composition, this song is sure to get everyone on their feet. Experience the joy and excitement of Balle Vellaiya Thevaa as it brings a lively atmosphere to any occasion!
stanzaMeanings: This is the time to give a performance like a tiger dance.
The one who takes the lead will now be the one to dance.
Like a flower that blooms, your time will come and the transformation will happen.
If we break through, we will go right; your time will come and the change will seek you out.
Balle vellaiya theva, Balle vellaiya theva, come, come, saying Balle vellaiya theva (2 times).
If the mind is set, it will surely succeed.
On the earth, there will always be a day when the target will be hit.
Need to set up a colorful banner and go around the town.
On the tower, set up a speaker and sing a song about you.
Balle vellaiya theva, Balle vellaiya theva, come, come, saying Balle vellaiya theva (2 times).
